stories.title: National Park & Recreation Month — Free COS Events and Contests in July

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
July is National Park & Recreation Month. COS has free family events.

Silent disco at Panorama Park July 11, 6–8 PM. Music in the Park at Piñon Valley July 25, 6:30–8:30 PM.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Colorado Springs Parks is running three contests this July.

Design your dream park. Submit a photo for the Discover COS Calendar. Color a park scene by July 31.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: July Is National Park & Recreation Month: Free Events and Contests for COS Families

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
National Park & Recreation Month

**IMAGE 1-A** | Social (1200x675) | X/Twitter
Concept: A lively outdoor park scene at golden hour — a wide grassy lawn with a diverse group of adults and children (silhouettes or viewed from behind, no identifiable individuals) dancing and moving to music in an informal silent disco setup. Wireless headphones visible on some attendees. Warm amber and golden light filtering through nearby mature trees. Panoramic park backdrop with Rocky Mountain foothills visible in the background. Art style: vibrant lifestyle photography aesthetic, warm and joyful energy. Color palette: golden sunlight, deep green grass, soft purple evening sky at the horizon. Bottom third: flat green grass with no people — clear for text overlay.

**IMAGE 1-B** | Article Hero (1200x630)
Concept: Wide shot of a family (two adults, two children ages 4–8, all viewed from behind) exploring a Colorado neighborhood park on a bright summer day. A paved path winds through green grass toward a playground structure in the middle distance. Rocky mountain foothills or red rock terrain visible in the background. A frisbee or ball in mid-air adds movement. Art style: warm editorial lifestyle photography, sunlit, authentic. Color palette: vivid green grass, clear blue sky, warm sandy path tones. Right lower quarter of frame is clear path with no figures.

---

stories.title: CPSC Recalls Multiple Magnetic Toys in 2026 — Deadly Ingestion Hazard

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
⚠️ CPSC has recalled children's magnetic toys for a deadly hazard.

Swallowed magnets can attract through the intestinal wall, causing perforations or death. Three toys recalled in 2026 alone.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Three magnetic toy recalls to know in 2026: Montessori Busy Board, Lterfear pounding game, and Joyreal Busy Board.

All sold on Amazon. All still in homes. Check cpsc.gov now.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: CPSC Has Recalled Multiple Magnetic Toys in 2026 — Here's What COS Families Need to Know

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
CPSC Magnet Toy Recalls

**IMAGE 2-A** | Social (1200x675) | X/Twitter
Concept: Close-up still-life of a wooden children's toy on a clean white surface. The toy appears to be a wooden activity board or busy board with colorful elements. A few small round elements (abstract, not labeled) are scattered loose near the toy — suggesting they have detached. Studio product photography lighting, slightly clinical and serious. Art style: flat editorial product photography. Color palette: natural wood tones, white surface, muted warm accent colors on toy components. Bottom third: clear white surface with no objects.

**IMAGE 2-B** | Article Hero (1200x630)
Concept: A parent (adult, viewed from the side at mid-torso, no face visible) picking up and examining a small wooden children's toy with a concerned posture — holding it up to look at it carefully. Soft natural light from the left. Background is a softly blurred family living room: toys visible, warm home environment. Art style: authentic documentary lifestyle photography, warm but serious mood. Color palette: natural wood tones, warm living room neutral beige and cream, golden natural light. Right third of frame is softly blurred background — kept uncluttered.

---

stories.title: Fort Carson Freedom Fest July 3 — Free Concert, Food Trucks, and Drone Show

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
🎆 Fort Carson Freedom Fest — July 3, Iron Horse Park, 4–10 PM. Free and open to the public.

Tyler Hubbard headlines. 20+ food trucks, bounce houses, and a patriotic drone show.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: Fort Carson's Freedom Fest on July 3 Is Free, Family-Friendly, and Open to Everyone

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Fort Carson Freedom Fest

**IMAGE 3-A** | Social (1200x675) | X/Twitter
Concept: A festive outdoor concert scene at dusk — a large open park with a stage in the distance illuminated by bright stage lights, crowd silhouettes in the foreground facing the stage. String lights and American flag bunting visible in the background. The sky grades from deep blue-purple at the top to golden amber near the horizon. A food truck visible at frame right. Art style: high-contrast concert photography aesthetic, energetic and celebratory. Color palette: deep dusk blues, warm amber stage light, American red-white-blue accent colors in bunting. Bottom third: flat grassy foreground with no figures.

**IMAGE 3-B** | Article Hero (1200x630)
Concept: Wide family scene at an outdoor festival — families with young children (viewed from behind, no identifiable individuals) walking through a festive grounds with colorful banners and a bounce house structure visible in the background. Late afternoon summer light. Festive atmosphere, relaxed and joyful. Art style: warm editorial lifestyle photography, summer festival feel. Color palette: vivid green grass, bright afternoon sunlight, primary color festival banners, neutral family clothing. Right quarter of frame is open grassy area with no figures.

---

stories.title: Universal Preschool 2026-27 — Enrollment Is Open for COS Families

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Universal Pre-K gives Colorado 4-year-olds 15 free preschool hours a week.

Enrollment for 2026-27 is ongoing. D11, D20, and D49 all participate. Apply at upk.colorado.gov.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: Colorado's Universal Preschool Program Is Open for 2026-27 — Here's How to Enroll in COS

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Universal Preschool

**IMAGE 4-A** | Social (1200x675) | X/Twitter
Concept: A warm, bright classroom scene — a young child (age 3–4, viewed from behind or at 3/4 angle, no identifiable face) sitting at a small table engaged in a hands-on learning activity with colorful blocks or art supplies. Soft natural light through classroom windows. Teacher's arm visible in frame providing guidance. Welcoming, nurturing environment. Art style: authentic early childhood education photography, warm and reassuring. Color palette: soft primary colors from learning materials, warm natural light, neutral classroom furniture tones. Lower third: clear desk or floor surface with no objects.

**IMAGE 4-B** | Article Hero (1200x630)
Concept: Wide shot of a bright, cheerful preschool classroom with small tables and chairs, shelves of colorful books and learning materials, and large windows with natural light. The room is empty or has a few children (viewed from behind, not identifiable) engaged at stations. Welcoming and organized environment — conveys quality early learning. Art style: editorial educational facility photography. Color palette: warm primary colors, natural wood furniture, soft white walls, golden window light. Right third of frame is light-colored wall with no objects.

stories.title: Rosemont Reservoir — What Families Need to Know Before July 4

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Rosemont Reservoir's campground and boating access are still in planning — no confirmed opening date yet.

Fishing is allowed May–October now. For updates, visit csu.org or cpw.state.co.us.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: Rosemont Reservoir: What COS Families Need to Know Before July 4

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Rosemont Reservoir

**IMAGE 5-A** | Social (1200x675) | X/Twitter
Concept: A serene high-altitude reservoir scene at approximately 9,600 feet — calm, dark-blue-green water reflecting a dramatic Colorado sky with cumulus clouds. Rocky pine-forested shoreline visible on the far bank. No people, no boats. The foreground shows a rocky shore leading to the water's edge. Art style: dramatic landscape photography, Pacific Northwest-meets-Colorado mountain aesthetic, peaceful and anticipatory. Color palette: deep blue-green water, silver-white clouds, dark pine green forest, gray-tan rocky foreground. Lower third: rocky shoreline with no objects — clear for text overlay.

**IMAGE 5-B** | Article Hero (1200x630)
Concept: Wide panoramic view of a high-altitude Colorado reservoir nestled among pine-forested slopes, with dramatic mountains and Pikes Peak-scale terrain visible in the background. A single kayak or canoe is visible on the water (no identifiable occupant, seen from a distance). Bright summer day, blue sky, a few wispy clouds. Art style: epic landscape photography, aspirational outdoor adventure. Color palette: brilliant blue sky, deep green pine slopes, steel blue-green water, warm golden sunlight. Right third: open sky and water with no objects.
